libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-test runtime on JDK 25, set system properties/runtime args: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Generate coverage around normal WebClient usage with a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1: HTTP methods, headers/query params, JSON bodies, forms/multipart, redirects, sessions/cookies, streaming, and caching. Avoid external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient references optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; tests that deliberately exercise OAuth2WebClient may need that dependency, but it is not required for meaningful core WebClient coverage.
Native-image verification remains authoritative because Netty/JDK 25 unsafe-access behavior can vary with native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, so native-image runtime tests on JDK 25 should keep the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already required for the existing 5.0.0 scaffold. Core WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and does not require Docker or extra Maven dependencies.
